name: Grapefruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the cake flour, salt, baking soda, and baking powder.
2. Cream the shortening with the grated grapefruit rind and sugar until fluffy.
3. Add the eggs and egg yolk one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
4. Alternately add the sifted dry ingredients and grapefruit juice in small amounts, beating well after each addition.
5. Pour the batter into greased pans.
6. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 30 to 35 minutes.
7. Makes 3 (9 inch) layers.
